jsonld.name: Temporal Grain Illegibility
jsonld.description: The structural impossibility of communicating the experiential texture of your temporal grain to someone whose temporal experience is radically coarser, where any description necessarily translates into their temporal framework and thus fundamentally misrepresents what you're trying to convey.
